textPlain: A similar article was posted earlier this year, discussion here: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=43149077

Wouldn't it have been much more sensible to have a lowercase version of alphanumerics in the QR code standard? Almost all URLs are lowercase, and even if the have capitalised parts, in most cases they're case-insensitive.
This also seems to work for URLs so next time I will create a QR code I will keep this in mind. Really useful!I tested this with the following example: https://imgur.com/a/hTsvV3Z
First time learning about this detail.
